name: Islamic Revolutionary Guard Corps (IRGC)
summary: Day 63 Thursday. ARAGHCHI 'NO LEADERSHIP CONSENSUS' VIA 4 MEDIATOR CHANNELS = OPERATIONAL PARALYSIS UNDER VAHIDI-IRGC; 8-DAY KINETIC PAUSE CONTINUES; RIAL 1.8M = REGIME CRACKING UNDER ECONOMIC PRESSURE. Iran's FM Araghchi told Pakistani, Egyptian, Turkish AND Qatari mediators over the weekend that 'there's no consensus inside the Iranian leadership about how to address the U.S. demands' (Axios primary, Voice of Emirates corroborates). Iran is COMMUNICATING the internal deadlock to four parallel channels rather than concealing it. Combined with Reuters Apr 28 wire-tier 'IRGC Seize Wartime Power' synthesis, the framing of yesterday's brief 'unified IRGC defiance under Vahidi' updates to OPERATIONAL PARALYSIS UNDER VAHIDI-IRGC — IRGC consolidation has produced operational paralysis, not unified defiance. Iran rial 1.8M/USD black market (Apr 29 record low; -36% in 6 days; ~90% to 2M Brookings hyperinflation trigger). [TRUNCATED — needs re-synthesis]
